home.confirm_clear_history_desc: Are you sure you want to delete all match analysis history? This action cannot be undone.

match.fundamental_desc: Basic info, recent form, match stats
match.custom_placeholder: Enter injuries, weather, referee, motivation, etc...
match.disclaimer_1: 1. This report is automatically generated by MatchFlow AI and is for entertainment and reference purposes only.
match.disclaimer_2: 2. All analyses, predictions, and data interpretations in this report are based on historical data and algorithmic models and do not represent deterministic results.
match.disclaimer_3: 3. MatchFlow does not provide any form of gambling or investment advice. Users shall bear the risks of any decisions made based on this report.
match.disclaimer_4: 4. Football matches are full of uncertainties, and AI models cannot predict all sudden situations (such as last-minute injuries, red cards, etc.).
match.disclaimer_5: 5. Please view the match results rationally and do not indulge in gambling.
match.share_text: Check out the analysis report for {{home}} vs {{away}}
match.invalid_json: Invalid JSON data. Please fix in JSON view.
match.edit_json_hint: You can manually edit the JSON data before sending to Agent.
match.edit_form_hint: Please edit parameters below before sending to Agent.
match.generate_animation: Generate Demo Animation (May increase analysis time)
match.regen_animation_placeholder: Enter instruction to regenerate animation (e.g., Change color to red)
match.scan_to_import: Scan to import match data and start analysis

settings.title: Settings
settings.reasoner_warning: Note: Reasoner models will output reasoning process in the Agent runtime.
settings.deepseek_key_hint: Key is stored locally in your browser. Get one from DeepSeek Open Platform.
settings.gemini_key_hint: If left blank, the system default API Key will be used. Get one from Google AI Studio.
settings.match_data_hint: If not configured, the app will use built-in mock data.

scan.title: Scan QR Code
scan.camera_permission_error: Cannot access camera. Please grant permission in system settings.
scan.no_permission_desc: Please allow camera access in system settings and refresh the page.
scan.scan_hint: Place QR code within the frame to scan

share.config_desc: Includes team info, recent form, and custom data
